chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 06 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 15.02.2024 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Nauman Ali, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Shaukat Ali Chaudhry, Advocate for respondents No.1 & 2. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that petitioner has expired, therefore, this petition has become infructuous, and he does not press the same. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
